title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd!
